title: Why streamer Clavicular suddenly tried removing DaBaby from his Miami club mid-performance
summary_full: A live performance by rapper DaBaby at streamer Clavicular's Miami nightclub took a dramatic turn when Clavicular was seen demanding the artist be removed. Reports suggest Clavicular was angered by allegations that DaBaby's crew brought firearms into the venue, violating club policy. The incident, captured on video, has sparked widespread discussion online, with fans awaiting further statements from those involved.
